ADP-mk4 Helmet Big Boss.guide: The Big Boss variant of the ADP armor is an extremely rare drop. It is worn exclusively by high-tier 'boss' NPCs during bounty missions. You must purposefully strip it from their body, or rarely find it in red loot boxes deep in security bunkers.

ADP-mk4 Helmet Exec.guide: The Executive variant is worn by Elite corporate security forces. You must disable the Comms Array, enter a Hurston Dynamics bunker (like Security Depot 1), and incapacitate the Elite Guards to loot them.

locations: Headhunters Patrol Contracts - Ace Pilot Spawns
Ace Interceptor Helmet.guide: Ace Interceptor gear drops from 'Ace Pilots' who randomly spawn during Foxwell Security or Headhunter Patrol missions. You must grind the base Yellow Foxwell missions to unlock the Orange/Red tiers where Ace Pilots actually spawn. Once engaged, 'soft-death' their ship (often a Hornet Mk1) and EVA over to strip the gear from their body before the mission despawns.

Ace Interceptor Flight Suit.guide: Ace Interceptor gear drops from 'Ace Pilots' who randomly spawn during Foxwell Security or Headhunter Patrol missions. You must grind the base Yellow Foxwell missions to unlock the Orange/Red tiers where Ace Pilots actually spawn. Once engaged, 'soft-death' their ship (often a Hornet Mk1) and EVA over to strip the gear from their body before the mission despawns.
